product.name: L-Shaped Executive Desk
product.description: The DMD L-Shaped Executive Desk product for Executive Desk. A sleek executive desk in dark wood finish featuring dual pedestal drawers, integrated cable cutouts, and a raised modesty panel. Supported by metal framing, it offers expansive workspace, under-desk lighting, and tech-ready functionality—ideal for modern office environments.
product.image: /Images/Office/Workstations/Executive Desk/L-Shaped Executive Desk/L-Shaped Executive Desk with LED Lights.jpg

image.src: /Images/Office/Workstations/Executive Desk/L-Shaped Executive Desk/L-Shaped Executive Desk with LED Lights.jpg
image.alt: L-Shaped Executive Desk - L-Shaped Executive Desk with LED Lights

image.src: /Images/Office/Workstations/Executive Desk/L-Shaped Executive Desk/L-Shaped Executive Desk with LED Lights 1.jpg
image.alt: L-Shaped Executive Desk - L-Shaped Workstation Dark

product.name: L-Shaped Executive Desk 2
product.description: The DMD Stratus is a modern L-shaped workstation desk designed for executive and home office environments. Its layout maximizes surface area while maintaining a sleek, professional aesthetic.

image.src: /Images/Office/Workstations/Executive Desk/L-Shaped Executive Desk 2/L-Shaped Executive Desk 2 - Cable Managment.png
